agent.name: Swaraj N S
agent.bio: With over 12 years of experience in Dubai's luxury real estate market, Swaraj specializes in high-end villas, penthouses, and waterfront properties. Her deep market knowledge, extensive network, and personalized white-glove approach have helped hundreds of discerning clients find their perfect home or investment property in Dubai.

homepage.heroTitle: Find Your Dream Property in Dubai
homepage.heroSubtitle: Exclusive luxury properties handpicked by Dubai's most trusted real estate specialist

about.headline: A Trusted Name in Dubai Luxury Real Estate
about.subheadline: Dedicated to finding you the perfect property with discretion, expertise, and a personal touch.
about.story:
With over a decade of experience in Dubai's luxury property market, I have built a reputation for delivering exceptional results for buyers, sellers, and investors. My deep knowledge of premium communities — from Palm Jumeirah to Downtown Dubai — means you always have an insider advantage.

I believe buying or selling a home is one of the most significant decisions in your life. That's why I offer a truly personalised service — listening carefully to your needs, guiding you through every step, and ensuring complete transparency from the first viewing to the final signature.

highlights.title: 250+ Properties Sold
highlights.description: Proven track record across Dubai's most prestigious communities.

highlights.title: Personal Service
highlights.description: Direct contact with me at every stage — no handoffs, no middlemen.

highlights.title: Local Expertise
highlights.description: Deep knowledge of every luxury community in Dubai.

highlights.title: End-to-End Support
highlights.description: From search to keys — legal, mortgage, and handover guidance included.

services.title: Luxury Sales
services.description: Villas, penthouses, and apartments in Dubai's most exclusive addresses.

services.title: Investment Advisory
services.description: ROI-focused guidance for off-plan and ready property investments.

services.title: Buyer Representation
services.description: Dedicated search and negotiation on your behalf at no extra cost.

services.title: Property Valuation
services.description: Accurate, data-driven valuations for sales and portfolio purposes.
